diagnostic_evidence.command_family: ffmpeg with libass subtitles filter plus ffprobe readback
diagnostic_evidence.rehearsal_invocation_command: uvx python -c "from pathlib import Path; import json; from src.integrations.render.subtitle_preset_selector import write_subtitle_render_path_selector_probe_local_artifacts, RENDER_PATH_PROBE_LOCAL_OUTPUT_RELATIVE_DIR, RENDER_PATH_PROBE_SOURCE_VIDEO_RELATIVE_PATH, RENDER_PATH_PROBE_SOURCE_AUDIO_RELATIVE_PATH; local = write_subtitle_render_path_selector_probe_local_artifacts(output_dir=RENDER_PATH_PROBE_LOCAL_OUTPUT_RELATIVE_DIR, source_video_path=RENDER_PATH_PROBE_SOURCE_VIDEO_RELATIVE_PATH, source_audio_path=RENDER_PATH_PROBE_SOURCE_AUDIO_RELATIVE_PATH, base_dir=Path.cwd()); print(json.dumps({'status': local.get('status'), 'outputs': local.get('outputs'), 'metadata': local.get('metadata'), 'ignored_by_git': local.get('ignored_by_git'), 'production_render_acceptance': local.get('production_render_acceptance'), 'public_use_permission': local.get('public_use_permission')}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))"
